2606.10208.title: Exploration of Foundation Model-Based Robots in Patient and Elderly Care
2606.10208.paper_summary: Demand for older-adult and patient care is growing rapidly as populations age worldwide. Foundation models are increasingly being integrated into robots and interactive agents, with the promise of more flexible communication and personalized assistance. However, care settings require reliable and workflow-compatible systems with accountable human oversight, and it remains unclear whether current embodied systems can translate technical advances into clinical impact. This Perspective synthesizes foundation model-based care robots across three areas: design features, user experience, and evidence for care-related outcomes. Current systems most commonly use foundation models as conversational and reasoning layers within voice-centered socially assistive embodiments, while multimodal grounding and physical autonomy remain limited. Empirical evaluations report positive usability and engagement benefits, but reliability failures persist across the interaction pipeline such as hallucinations and conversational breakdowns. Evidence for care impact remains concentrated in proximal outcomes such as cognitive engagement and participation, with limited evidence for validated clinical or care-related changes. We argue that future research should transition toward care-specific evaluation standards, accountable autonomy, and integration into care workflows to support more responsive and responsible care technologies.
2606.10208.paper_summary_zh: 對於老年人和病患的護理需求隨著全球人口老化而迅速增長。基礎模型正越來越多地被整合進入機器人和互動代理中，承諾提供更靈活的溝通和個性化的協助。然而，護理環境需要可靠且與工作流程兼容的系統，並且需要有負責任的人類監督，目前尚不清楚現有的具身系統是否能將技術進步轉化為臨床影響。這篇觀點文章綜合了基於基礎模型的護理機器人在三個領域的應用：設計特徵、用戶體驗和護理相關結果的證據。目前的系統最常見地將基礎模型用作語音中心社會輔助具身體驗中的對話和推理層，而多模態基礎和物理自主性仍然有限。實證評估報告了積極的可用性和參與好處，但在互動流程中仍然存在可靠性失效，例如幻覺和對話中斷。護理影響的證據仍然集中在近端結果上，如認知參與和參與度，對於經過驗證的臨床或護理相關變化的證據有限。我們認為未來的研究應該轉向護理特定的評估標準、負責任的自主性以及與護理工作流程的整合，以支持更具響應性和負責任的護理技術。
2606.10208.author: Zhiwen Qiu et.al.
2606.10208.authors: Zhiwen Qiu, Wei Liu, Yuexing Hao
